message:
test(fuzz): add SymbolRecord encode/decode + layout fuzz target (resolves etzqz)

SymbolRecord (fcps.rs:275-348) is the per-symbol wire format inside
FCPS frames: esi (u32 LE) || k (u16 LE) || data || auth_tag (16 bytes).
Existing fuzz_fcps_frame tests SymbolRecord::decode panic-freedom but
NOT the round-trip / layout binding / encode_to agreement.

A regression in any byte position would silently corrupt symbol routing
(esi mismatch), reconstruction threshold (k drift), or AEAD verification
(auth_tag misaligned).

Five properties:
- encode → decode(symbol_size) round-trip preserves all four fields
- wire_size == encode().len() == OVERHEAD + data.len()
- encode_to(buf) appends the same bytes as encode() (pure append, no
  prefix mutation)
- layout binding via byte-position assertions: esi at [0..4),
  k at [4..6), data at [6..6+symbol_size), auth_tag at last 16
- TooShort rejection at exact boundary len = OVERHEAD + symbol_size - 1

Once-gated regression anchors:
- (a) Known record (esi=0x12345678, k=0x9ABC, 8-byte data, 16-byte tag)
  has exact byte layout per documentation and round-trips
- (b) decode at boundary len=29 (with symbol_size=8, OVERHEAD=22) MUST
  trip TooShort with len=29, min=30

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
